utterances.speaker: Drew
utterances.text: I did not think you were gay . I do now .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: See my friend ... my friend , Rachel , she wants to be set up .

utterances.speaker: Drew
utterances.text: Ahh , I just got out of a big relationship , I am not looking for anything serious .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I just got out of a big relationship

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , you know what , that might be okay even if it was just kind of a fling , that might be all right with Rachel .

utterances.speaker: Mike
utterances.text: Whoa ... whoa ... whoa ... whoa ! Is this , hot Rachel , that you took to the Christmas party , Rachel ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_Is this , hot Rachel , that you took to the Christmas party , Rachel ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , by the way , that is her full name .

utterances.speaker: Mike
utterances.text: Oh wow ! I am free for her !

utterances.speaker: Drew
utterances.text: Oh , wait a second ! I did not say I was not free !

emotion_cause.span: 8_I did not say I was not free !

utterances.speaker: Mike
utterances.text: Hey , Chandler , why do not we talk this over at the Ranger game tomorrow ?

utterances.speaker: Drew
utterances.text: Hold on , you know I just got a box of Cubans , maybe I bring them by your office around uh , five ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh well , that is uh , a little later than I uh , generally care to stay , but sure !

emotion_cause.span: 10_I just got a box of Cubans , maybe I bring them by your office around uh , five ?

utterances.speaker: Mike
utterances.text: Maybe , before the game we could enjoy some eight year old some small batch Basel Hadens .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I do not really know what that is , but let’s ! !

emotion_cause.span: 12_before the game we could enjoy some eight year old some small batch Basel Hadens .
